description: Debt contract. Location: Minyat Ashna. Dated: middle third of Av 1460 Sel. = July 1149 CE, under the jurisdiction of the Nagid Shemuel b. Ḥananya. In which Abū l-Faḍl Shela acknowledges a debt of 6 7/8 dinars to Shemarya b. Sheʾerit ha-Kohen which he will repay by 1 Kislev 1461 Sel. = 3 November 1149 CE. Signed by Yeshuʿa b. Avraham ha-Kohen ha-Gelili, Yiṣḥaq b. Moshe, and Mevorakh b. Peraḥya. AA/ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
